title: Add Google Site Verification meta tag to index.html

requirements.text: Add the Google Site Verification meta tag `<meta name="google-site-verification" content="xD35XIyzJcMzSAzDAaT9PFlXd6bn5Yfz5VAKoTrASTU" />` inside the `<head>` section of `frontend/index.html`.

quotes: Add this meta tag to existing project

acceptanceCriteria: The `<head>` section of `frontend/index.html` contains exactly `<meta name="google-site-verification" content="xD35XIyzJcMzSAzDAaT9PFlXd6bn5Yfz5VAKoTrASTU" />`.
No existing meta tags or other head content are removed or modified.
The page still renders correctly after the change.

constraints: Do not modify any backend files.
Do not alter any existing meta tags, SEO tags, or other head content in index.html.
nonGoals: Adding verification tags to any other file or component (e.g., SEOHead.tsx).
Any other SEO or meta tag changes.
